title: stillingia lineata subsp. lineata
intro: Stillingia lineata subsp. lineata, also known as the Indian paint root or yellowroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow roots and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stillingia lineata subsp. lineata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine and natural remedies.
